problem id: 24f44584
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(7) AND NOT SHR(4)) XOR NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  11101011 -> 01101110
  10110001 -> 00001111
  01001111 -> 10111100
  10001101 -> 10011001
  01100000 -> 11001111
  00111001 -> 01000011
  00010000 -> 11110111
  11010110 -> 01011101

query: 00001000
predicted answer: 11111011
